senses.gloss: passive participle of غَمَّ (ḡamma); grieved, caused to mourn or lament or be sorrowful
passive participle of غَمَّ (ḡamma); covered until they have become ripe
passive participle of غَمَّ (ḡamma); concealed by clouds

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of the verb غَمَّ (ḡamma, “to cover, to fill with grief”).
